authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(41) — Deadman Creek (Mono Co.)
sources.quotedText: Deadman Creek downstream from Hwy. 395. See Owens River, subsection (b)(10). All year. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: Visit Mono County — Owens River (including Deadman Creek headwaters area)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Applies to Deadman Creek downstream from Hwy. 395; this stretch is regulated as part of the Owens River, see 7.50(b)(10).

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year on Deadman Creek downstream from Hwy. 395 (regulated with the Owens River)
regulations.verbatimText: Deadman Creek downstream from Hwy. 395. See Owens River, subsection (b)(10). All year.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.
